patterns.name: Page heading with actions
patterns.description: Page title with a primary action aligned to the right — the Pine equivalent of Sage PageHeading during Kajabi admin migration.
patterns.when: Top of any admin index or detail screen that needs a title plus one or more header actions (create, save, export).
patterns.code:
<pds-box justify-content="space-between" align-items="center" fit margin-block-end="md">
  <pds-text tag="h1">Agents</pds-text>
  <pds-button variant="primary">
    <pds-icon slot="start" name="add" aria-hidden="true"></pds-icon>
    New chatbot
  </pds-button>
</pds-box>
notes: Matches kajabi-products list/detail screens that still use Sage PageHeading with a PdsButton in actions — compose this pds-box row in new Pine-only UI.
justify-content="space-between" align-items="center" keeps the CTA on the trailing edge; use gap="sm" on a nested pds-box when there are multiple actions (Save + Cancel).
Icon-in-button uses slot="start" with a valid icon name (add), not the deprecated icon prop.
Pair with table-in-card below the heading on index pages.

patterns.name: Table in card
patterns.description: A responsive pds-table inside a bordered, shadowed pds-box — how kajabi-products wraps list tables (expert agents, referrals, commerce).
patterns.when: Any admin data table that should read as a card on the page background rather than a bare grid.
patterns.code:
<pds-box border-radius="lg" shadow="100" display="block" fit>
  <pds-table component-id="expert-agents-table" responsive row-dividers>
    <pds-table-head background>
      <pds-table-row>
        <pds-table-head-cell>Name</pds-table-head-cell>
        <pds-table-head-cell>Status</pds-table-head-cell>
        <pds-table-head-cell>Created</pds-table-head-cell>
        <pds-table-head-cell>Actions</pds-table-head-cell>
      </pds-table-row>
    </pds-table-head>
    <pds-table-body>
      <pds-table-row>
        <pds-table-cell>Teaching Assistant</pds-table-cell>
        <pds-table-cell>Active</pds-table-cell>
        <pds-table-cell>Mar 3, 2026</pds-table-cell>
        <pds-table-cell>⋯</pds-table-cell>
      </pds-table-row>
    </pds-table-body>
  </pds-table>
</pds-box>
notes: Matches ExpertAgentsList: PdsBox borderRadius="lg" shadow="100" display="block" fit wrapping PdsTable responsive.
Use pds-table-head background and optional border; kajabi-products wraps head cells in pds-table-row (both this and head-cell-only layouts work).
responsive enables horizontal scroll for wide column sets; row-dividers adds row separators.
Sits directly under page-heading-actions — no pds-container wrapper on typical full-width admin lists.

patterns.name: List page (heading + table)
patterns.description: Full kajabi-products-style index page: page heading with primary action, then a card-wrapped responsive table.
patterns.when: Resource index screens (agents, products, orders) with a create action and a data table.
patterns.code:
<pds-box direction="column" gap="md" fit>
  <pds-box justify-content="space-between" align-items="center" fit>
    <pds-text tag="h1">Agents</pds-text>
    <pds-button variant="primary">
      <pds-icon slot="start" name="add" aria-hidden="true"></pds-icon>
      New chatbot
    </pds-button>
  </pds-box>

  <pds-box border-radius="lg" shadow="100" display="block" fit>
    <pds-table component-id="agents" responsive row-dividers>
      <pds-table-head background>
        <pds-table-row>
          <pds-table-head-cell>Name</pds-table-head-cell>
          <pds-table-head-cell>Status</pds-table-head-cell>
          <pds-table-head-cell>Created</pds-table-head-cell>
        </pds-table-row>
      </pds-table-head>
      <pds-table-body>
        <pds-table-row>
          <pds-table-cell>Teaching Assistant</pds-table-cell>
          <pds-table-cell>Active</pds-table-cell>
          <pds-table-cell>Mar 3, 2026</pds-table-cell>
        </pds-table-row>
      </pds-table-body>
    </pds-table>
  </pds-box>
</pds-box>
notes: Composes page-heading-actions + table-in-card — the target Pine layout for kajabi-products list screens.
While migrating, teams may still use Sage PageHeading for the title row; replace it with the heading pds-box when touching the file.
Loading state: return <pds-loader is-loading size="md"></pds-loader> alone (see empty-and-loading). Zero rows: use empty-state-pine.

patterns.name: List page with filters
patterns.description: Index page with page heading, pds-filters bar, and card-wrapped table — matches workflows AutomationFilters + table layouts.
patterns.when: Index screens that need filtering before the table (automations, orders, contacts).
patterns.code:
<pds-box direction="column" gap="md" fit>
  <pds-text tag="h1">Automations</pds-text>

  <pds-filters>
    <pds-filter component-id="trigger" variant="default" text="Trigger" icon="flash"></pds-filter>
    <pds-filter component-id="action" variant="default" text="Action" icon="activity"></pds-filter>
    <pds-filter component-id="more" variant="more" text="More filters" icon="add-circle"></pds-filter>
    <pds-filter component-id="clear" variant="clear" text="Clear filters"></pds-filter>
  </pds-filters>

  <pds-box border-radius="lg" shadow="100" display="block" fit>
    <pds-table component-id="automations" responsive row-dividers>
      <pds-table-head background>
        <pds-table-row>
          <pds-table-head-cell>Name</pds-table-head-cell>
          <pds-table-head-cell>Trigger</pds-table-head-cell>
          <pds-table-head-cell>Status</pds-table-head-cell>
        </pds-table-row>
      </pds-table-head>
      <pds-table-body>
        <pds-table-row>
          <pds-table-cell>Welcome sequence</pds-table-cell>
          <pds-table-cell>Form submit</pds-table-cell>
          <pds-table-cell>Active</pds-table-cell>
        </pds-table-row>
      </pds-table-body>
    </pds-table>
  </pds-box>
</pds-box>
notes: Real kajabi-products filters (AutomationFilters) slot dropdown panels inside pds-filter and toggle variant="selected" on applied chips — this recipe shows the static trigger row.
Use variant="more" for overflow and variant="clear" for reset; icons should match filter semantics (flash, activity, add-circle).
Filters sit in the column flow between heading and table-in-card, separated by the parent gap.
Compose with page-heading-actions when the index also needs a header CTA.

patterns.name: Settings / edit form page
patterns.description: Kajabi admin edit form: page heading row with Save/Cancel, 60/30 body, field sections in card boxes — matches commerce coupon forms.
patterns.when: Create/edit flows (coupons, offers, configuration) with header actions, stacked field sections, and an optional sidebar.
patterns.code:
<pds-box direction="column" gap="md" fit display="block">
  <pds-box fit direction="row" justify-content="space-between" align-items="center" margin-block-end="md" flex="grow">
    <pds-text tag="h1">Edit coupon</pds-text>
    <pds-box direction="row" gap="sm">
      <pds-button variant="secondary">Cancel</pds-button>
      <pds-button variant="primary">Save</pds-button>
    </pds-box>
  </pds-box>

  <pds-box direction="row" align-items="start" gap="lg" fit>
    <pds-box flex="1">
      <pds-box direction="column" gap="md">
        <pds-box direction="column" gap="sm" padding="md" shadow="100" border-radius="md" background-color="var(--pine-color-background-container)">
          <pds-text tag="h6" size="lg" weight="semibold">Details</pds-text>
          <pds-input label="Coupon code" value="SUMMER20"></pds-input>
          <pds-input label="Name" value="Summer sale"></pds-input>
        </pds-box>
        <pds-box direction="column" gap="sm" padding="md" shadow="100" border-radius="md" background-color="var(--pine-color-background-container)">
          <pds-text tag="h6" size="lg" weight="semibold">Discount</pds-text>
          <pds-input label="Percent off" value="20"></pds-input>
        </pds-box>
      </pds-box>
    </pds-box>
    <pds-box flex="0 0 30%">
      <pds-box direction="column" gap="sm" padding="md" shadow="100" border-radius="md" background-color="var(--pine-color-background-container)">
        <pds-text tag="h6" size="lg" weight="semibold">Summary</pds-text>
        <pds-text color="--pine-color-text-secondary">Review discount details before saving.</pds-text>
      </pds-box>
    </pds-box>
  </pds-box>
</pds-box>
notes: Matches CouponsPageHeading + CouponFormLayout: heading row is full width (fit + flex="grow"), title start / actions end via justify-content="space-between".

Body row uses gap="lg" between main and sidebar — not justify-content="space-between". Main flex="1", sidebar flex="0 0 30%" (coupon form uses ~60/30 with space-between; gap="lg" is the Pine-native equivalent).
Stack field groups in card boxes (padding="md" shadow="100" border-radius="md" background-color="var(--pine-color-background-container)") with an h6 section title.
For narrow single-column settings, drop the split and use one stacked column of section cards instead.

patterns.name: Loading states
patterns.description: How kajabi-products admin screens load async data — usually a standalone pds-loader, optionally centered when inline.
patterns.when: Initial page load or refetch while a list/detail region is empty.
patterns.code:
<!-- Default (ExpertAgentsList, ExpertAgentShow) -->
<pds-loader is-loading size="md"></pds-loader>

<!-- Inline region with label -->
<pds-box direction="column" align-items="center" gap="sm" padding="xl">
  <pds-loader is-loading size="md"></pds-loader>
  <pds-text>Loading agents…</pds-text>
</pds-box>
notes: kajabi-products default: return <pds-loader is-loading size="md"></pds-loader> while the query is loading — no extra wrapper.
Use the centered box + label variant only when loading a subsection (panel, modal body) that needs context.
Pair with empty-state-pine when data resolves to zero rows.

patterns.name: Empty state (Pine)
patterns.description: Pine-native zero-data panel with icon badge, title, description, and actions — matches kajabi_partner ReferralsTableEmptyState.
patterns.when: Replace Sage EmptyState on migrated admin screens when a list or table has no rows.
patterns.code:
<pds-box padding="xl" background-color="var(--pine-color-background-container)" border-radius="lg" direction="column" align-items="center" justify-content="center" gap="md" fit>
  <pds-box border-radius="circle" background-color="var(--pine-color-red-300)" padding="xl">
    <pds-icon name="users" size="40px" color="white"></pds-icon>
  </pds-box>
  <pds-text weight="semibold" align="center" size="2xl">No referrals</pds-text>
  <pds-text align="center" size="md" color="--pine-color-text-secondary">Referrals will display here as they join Kajabi using your referral links.</pds-text>
  <pds-box gap="sm">
    <pds-button variant="secondary">Learn more</pds-button>
    <pds-button variant="primary">Refer now</pds-button>
  </pds-box>
</pds-box>
notes: Matches ReferralsTableEmptyState: circular icon badge, semibold 2xl title, md body copy, secondary + primary actions.
Many kajabi-products screens still use Sage EmptyState (e.g. ExpertAgentsList) — migrate to this layout when converting the file.
Pick a semantic icon (users, folder, add) and a token background color for the badge circle.
Use fit on the outer box so the empty panel spans the content area width.
